_comment: Diverse, kid-safe character library rotated by the seed script across worksheets. The `description` field is injected directly into prompts — keep it concise, visually specific, and emphasize 'cute cartoon kid' framing. See docs/features/CONTENT_GENERATION_SAFETY.md.
_rotation_policy: The seed script cycles through characters in order using (topicIndex + variationIndex) % characters.length so every topic gets a diverse cast, not just the first few.

characters.description: cute cartoon Polynesian-African girl, ~6 years old, light brown skin, curly dark hair in two puffs, big brown eyes, friendly smile, colorful striped t-shirt
